servers.name: Filesystem
servers.description: Read, write, and search files on the server. Provides directory listing, file reading, file writing, and search capabilities.

servers.name: Web Fetch
servers.description: Fetch content from URLs on the web. Supports GET requests and returns page content as text.

servers.name: Memory
servers.description: Persistent memory using a knowledge graph. Store and retrieve entities, relations, and observations.
